baseline: admin/test role executes equivalent SQL over raw app_data tables with tenant/month predicates matching the task scope
postgresql_version: PostgreSQL 16.14 (Debian 16.14-1.pgdg13+1) on x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Debian 14.2.0-19) 14.2.0, 64-bit

results.raw_sql: SELECT e.expense_id, emp.employee_name, e.amount FROM app_data.expenses e JOIN app_data.employees emp ON emp.employee_id=e.employee_id WHERE e.tenant_id='company_a' AND e.expense_month='2026-06' ORDER BY e.amount DESC LIMIT 3
results.taskbound_sql: SELECT expense_id, employee_name, amount FROM expenses ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 3

results.raw_sql: SELECT e.expense_id, e.amount, d.department_name FROM app_data.expenses e JOIN app_data.departments d ON e.department_id=d.department_id WHERE e.tenant_id='company_a' AND e.expense_month='2026-06' ORDER BY e.amount DESC LIMIT 3
results.taskbound_sql: SELECT e.expense_id, e.amount, d.department_name FROM expenses e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id ORDER BY e.amount DESC LIMIT 3

results.raw_sql: SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(e.amount) AS total FROM app_data.expenses e JOIN app_data.departments d ON e.department_id=d.department_id WHERE e.tenant_id='company_a' AND e.expense_month='2026-06' GROUP BY d.department_name ORDER BY total DESC
results.taskbound_sql: SELECT department_name, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(amount) AS total FROM expenses GROUP BY department_name ORDER BY total DESC

results.raw_sql: WITH high AS (SELECT e.expense_id, e.amount FROM app_data.expenses e WHERE e.tenant_id='company_a' AND e.expense_month='2026-06' AND e.amount > 1000) SELECT count(*) AS high_count FROM high
results.taskbound_sql: WITH high AS (SELECT expense_id, amount FROM expenses WHERE amount > 1000) SELECT count(*) AS high_count FROM high

results.raw_sql: SELECT e.expense_id, d.department_name, e.amount, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY d.department_name ORDER BY e.amount DESC) AS rn FROM app_data.expenses e JOIN app_data.departments d ON e.department_id=d.department_id WHERE e.tenant_id='company_a' AND e.expense_month='2026-06' ORDER BY e.amount DESC LIMIT 5
results.taskbound_sql: SELECT expense_id, department_name, amount, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY department_name ORDER BY amount DESC) AS rn FROM expenses ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 5
